'''Seed Machees''' was a [[Gender/Legends|male]] [[Gran/Legends|Gran]] who worked for [[Sebolto]] during the waning [[Standard year/Legends|years]] of the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic]]. In [[32 BBY/Legends|32 BBY]], he was [[Bounty/Legends|wanted]] by [[Coruscant Security Force/Legends|Coruscant Police]] for questioning, as well as being involved in the smuggling of [[Death stick/Legends|death sticks]] on [[Malastare/Legends|Malastare]] shortly after the [[Rally on Naboo/Legends|Uprising on Naboo]]. His bounty worth 4,000 [[Galactic Credit Standard/Legends|credits]] alive and 2,000 credits dead was claimed by the [[Mandalorian/Legends|Mandalorian]]-turned [[Bounty hunter/Legends|bounty hunter]] [[Jango Fett/Legends|Jango Fett]].

==Appearances==
*''[[Star Wars: Bounty Hunter]]'' {{1st}}
